---
title: "CDISC-style variable names and labels"
format: html
---


```{r setup}
rm(list = ls())
require(here)
require(fs)

#-----------------------
# Functions and Packages
## Functions------------
source(here("../../pipelines_and_functions/data_processing_and_description_funcs.R"))

## Packages------------
pkgs<-c("haven",
        "tidyverse",
        "data.table",
        "labelled",
        "gtsummary",
        "gtreg",
        "gt",
        "conflicted")
func_install_and_load(pkgs)

conflict_prefer_all("dplyr",quiet=TRUE)
conflicts_prefer(lubridate::year)

theme_gtsummary_compact()
theme_gtsummary_journal(journal = "jama")
```

```{r data}
# Read data
## Raw
dt_.raw <- read_dta(here("../../data_management/data/co-luminate/raw_data/columinate_clean.dta")) |> 
  as_factor()

# Dictionary: Data variable and description
dictionary<-func_dictionary(dt_.raw)


dt_.<- dt_.raw |> 
  mutate(year_of_birth=year(dateofbirth)) |> 
  select(
    IIntId,HouseholdId,sex,dateofbirth,year_of_birth,
    starts_with("p_"),
    starts_with("hh_")
  )

vars<-names(dt_.)
common_vars<-vars[which(is.na(as.numeric(str_extract(vars, "[\\d\\.]+$"))))]
episodes<-sort(as.numeric(na.omit(unique(as.numeric(str_extract(vars, "[\\d\\.]+$"))))))

for(episode. in episodes){
  episode_vars<-vars[which(as.numeric(str_extract(vars, "[\\d\\.]+$"))==episode.)]
  dt.<-dt_. |> 
    mutate(episode=episode.) |> 
    select(any_of(common_vars),episode,any_of(episode_vars)) |> 
    rename_with(~ gsub(paste0(episode.,"$"),"",.x))
  
  if(episode.==min(episodes)){
    DATA<-dt. |> rename(hdssyr=episode)
  } else{
    DATA<-bind_rows(DATA,dt. |> rename(hdssyr=episode)) |> 
      arrange(IIntId,hdssyr) |> 
      filter(!if_all(names(DATA)[which(!names(DATA)%in%c(common_vars, "hdssyr"))], is.na))
    
  }
}
```

```{r}
varlabs<-func_dictionary(dt_.) |> 
  group_by(row_number()) |> 
  mutate(
    rmv=paste0(as.numeric(str_extract(variable, "[\\d\\.]+$")),"$"),
    variable=gsub(rmv,"",variable),
    rmv=paste0("^",as.numeric(str_extract(label, "^[\\d\\.]+"))),
    label=trimws(gsub(rmv,"",label)),
    label=ifelse(variable=="round","Visit name",label)
  ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(variable,label) |> 
  distinct()

DATA01<-DATA |>
  set_variable_labels(
    .labels = setNames(as.list(varlabs$label), varlabs$variable), .strict = FALSE
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    expage=hdssyr-year_of_birth,
    birth_expmonth=round((difftime(
      time1=as.Date(paste0(year_of_birth,"-12-31")),
      time2=dateofbirth,
      units="days"
    ) |> as.numeric())/365*12,0)
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    .by=IIntId,minexpage=min(expage,na.rm=TRUE),maxexpage=max(expage,na.rm=TRUE)
  ) |> 
  select(-contains("3y")) |> 
  relocate(minexpage,maxexpage,expage,birth_expmonth,.after = hdssyr) |>
  rename(
    USUBJID = IIntId,
    HHID = HouseholdId,
    SEX = sex,
    BRTHDT = dateofbirth,
    BRTHYR = year_of_birth,
    HDSSYR = hdssyr,
    MINEXPYR = minexpage,
    MAXEXPYR = maxexpage,
    EXPAGE = expage,
    BRTHEXPM = birth_expmonth,
    LIVEDWOM = p_without_her,
    LIVEDWOF = p_without_him,
    EDUCMOTH = p_edu_mother,
    EDUCFATH = p_edu_father,
    HHCHLD14 = hh_child_14num,
    HHCHLD4 = hh_child_4num,
    HHSES = hh_ses
  )

# 2. Define the compliant labels for all the newly named variables.
labels_for_dt <- list(
  USUBJID = "Unique Individual Identifier",
  HHID = "Unique Household Identifier",
  SEX = "Participant's Sex",
  BRTHDT = "Date of Birth",
  BRTHYR = "Year of Birth",
  HDSSYR = "HDSS Data Collection Year",
  MINEXPYR = "Minimum Exposure Age",
  MAXEXPYR = "Maximum Exposure Age",
  EXPAGE = "Exposure Age",
  BRTHEXPM = "Number of Exposure Months During Year of Birth",
  LIVEDWOM = "Lived Without Mother",
  LIVEDWOF = "Lived Without Father",
  EDUCMOTH = "Mother's Level of Education",
  EDUCFATH = "Father's Level of Education",
  HHCHLD14 = "Number of Children Aged 0-14y in Household",
  HHCHLD4 = "Number of Children Aged 0-4y in Household",
  HHSES = "Household Socioeconomic Status",
  BRTHDT    = "Date of Birth",
  VISITDT   = "Visit Date",
  SEX       = "Sex",
  AGE       = "Age (Years)",
  URBANCAT  = "Household Urbanicity Category",
  MIGRCAT   = "Migration Status (Baseline)",
  FATHSTAT  = "Father Status (Baseline)",
  MOTHSTAT  = "Mother Status (Baseline)",
  ORPHSTAT  = "Orphanhood Status (Baseline)",
  CLINDATA  = "Has Clinic Data",
  VISIT     = "Visit Name",
  STUDY     = "Study Name",
  SCHOOL    = "Currently in School",
  EMPLOY    = "Current Employment",
  GOVTGRNT  = "Receives Government Grant",
  EVRSEXCAT = "Ever Had Sex",
  HIVSTRESC = "HIV Test Result",
  VIOLENCE  = "Ever Experienced Violence",
  FOODSEC   = "Food Insecurity",
  EVRPREGCAT= "Ever Been Pregnant",
  SEXBHV    = "Sexual Behavior Category",
  DRNKALC   = "Ever Drank Alcohol",
  PHQ9      = "PHQ-9 Total Score",
  PHQ9FL    = "PHQ-9 ≥10",
  SISCORE   = "Suicidal Ideation Score",
  SIFL      = "Suicidal Ideation",
  SSQ14     = "SSQ-14 Score",
  SSQ14FL   = "SSQ-14 ≥9",
  SOCSUPP   = "Social Support",
  SISRC     = "SI Score Source",
  CDMLESSFL = "Condomless Sex",
  HSV2STRESC= "HSV-2 Test Result",
  CHLSTRESC = "Chlamydia Result",
  GONSTRESC = "Gonorrhea Result",
  TRISTRESC = "Trichomonas Result"
)

# 3. Apply the labels to the renamed dataframe.
dt_childhood_exposure <- DATA01 |>
  set_variable_labels(.labels = labels_for_dt, .strict = FALSE)
```

```{r}

# Episodes

vars<-names(dt_.raw)
common_vars<-vars[which(is.na(as.numeric(str_extract(vars, "[\\d\\.]+$"))))]
episodes<-sort(as.numeric(na.omit(unique(as.numeric(str_extract(vars, "[\\d\\.]+$"))))))
for(episode. in episodes){
  episode_vars<-vars[which(as.numeric(str_extract(vars, "[\\d\\.]+$"))==episode.)]
  dt.<-dt_.raw |> 
    mutate(episode=episode.) |> 
    select(any_of(common_vars),episode,any_of(episode_vars)) |> 
    rename_with(~ gsub(paste0(episode.,"$"),"",.x))
  
  if(episode.==min(episodes) | episode.==min(episodes[which(episodes>10)])){
    if(episode.<=10){
      DATA1<-dt. |> mutate(visityr=year(visitdate))
    } else{
      DATA2<-dt. |> rename(visityr=episode)
    }
  } else{
    if(episode.<=10){
      DATA1<-bind_rows(DATA1,dt.) |> 
        arrange(IndividualId,IIntId,visitdate) |> 
        filter(!if_all(names(DATA1)[which(!names(DATA1)%in%c(common_vars, "episode"))], is.na))
    } else{
      DATA2<-bind_rows(DATA2,dt. |> rename(visityr=episode)) |> 
        arrange(IndividualId,IIntId,visityr)# |> 
      #filter(!if_all(names(DATA2)[which(!names(DATA2)%in%c(common_vars, "visityr"))], is.na))
    }
    
  }
}

varlabs<-dictionary |> 
  group_by(row_number()) |> 
  mutate(
    rmv=paste0(as.numeric(str_extract(variable, "[\\d\\.]+$")),"$"),
    variable=gsub(rmv,"",variable),
    rmv=paste0("^",as.numeric(str_extract(label, "^[\\d\\.]+"))),
    label=trimws(gsub(rmv,"",label)),
    label=ifelse(variable=="round","Visit name",label)
  ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(variable,label) |> 
  distinct()


dt_analysis_multistudies<- left_join(DATA1, DATA2) |>
  # Arrange by individual and time to ensure correct filling order
  arrange(IndividualId, IIntId, visitdate) |>
  # Operations are performed within each individual's timeline
  group_by(IndividualId, IIntId) |>
  mutate(
    neg_fill = if_else(hiv_status == "Negative", "Negative", NA_character_),
    pos_fill = if_else(hiv_status == "Positive", "Positive", NA_character_)
  ) |>
  fill(neg_fill, .direction = "up") |>
  fill(pos_fill, .direction = "down") |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    hiv_status = factor(coalesce(neg_fill, pos_fill, as.character(hiv_status)))
  ) |>
  select(-c(episode, visityr, neg_fill, pos_fill)) |>
  set_variable_labels(
    .labels = setNames(as.list(varlabs$label), varlabs$variable), .strict = FALSE
  )
cols_to_keep <- c(
  "IIntId","HouseholdId","dateofbirth","visitdate","sex","age",
  "urban_or_rural","migration","fatherstatus","motherstatus","orphanstatus",
  "clinic_data","round","study_name","education","employment","governmentgrant",
  "everhadsex","hiv_status","violence","foodsec","everpregnant","sexual_behavior",
  "everdrankalcohol","depression_score","depression_outcome","suicidal_ideation_score",
  "suicidal_ideation_outcome","ssq14_score","ssq14_outcome","social_support",
  "suicidal_ideation_score_source","condomlesssex","hsv_test_result",
  "sp_sti_ch","sp_sti_ng","sp_sti_tv"
)

DATA01 <- dt_analysis_multistudies |>
  select(any_of(cols_to_keep)) |>
  rename(
    USUBJID    = IIntId,
    HHID      = HouseholdId,
    BRTHDT    = dateofbirth,
    VISITDT   = visitdate,
    SEX       = sex,
    AGE       = age,
    URBANCAT  = urban_or_rural,
    MIGRCAT   = migration,
    FATHSTAT  = fatherstatus,
    MOTHSTAT  = motherstatus,
    ORPHSTAT  = orphanstatus,
    CLINDATA  = clinic_data,
    VISIT     = round,
    STUDY     = study_name,
    SCHOOL    = education,
    EMPLOY    = employment,
    GOVTGRNT  = governmentgrant,
    EVRSEXCAT = everhadsex,
    HIVSTRESC = hiv_status,
    VIOLENCE  = violence,
    FOODSEC   = foodsec,
    EVRPREGCAT= everpregnant,
    SEXBHV    = sexual_behavior,
    DRNKALC   = everdrankalcohol,
    PHQ9      = depression_score,
    PHQ9FL    = depression_outcome,
    SISCORE   = suicidal_ideation_score,
    SIFL      = suicidal_ideation_outcome,
    SSQ14     = ssq14_score,
    SSQ14FL   = ssq14_outcome,
    SOCSUPP   = social_support,
    SISRC     = suicidal_ideation_score_source,
    CDMLESSFL = condomlesssex,
    HSV2STRESC= hsv_test_result,
    CHLSTRESC = sp_sti_ch,
    GONSTRESC = sp_sti_ng,
    TRISTRESC = sp_sti_tv
  )

# ---- 2) Define labels for the renamed variables -----------------------------
labels_for_dt <- list(
  USUBJID   = "Unique Subject Identifier",
  HHID      = "Household Identifier",
  BRTHDT    = "Date of Birth",
  VISITDT   = "Visit Date",
  SEX       = "Sex",
  AGE       = "Age (Years)",
  URBANCAT  = "Household Urbanicity Category",
  MIGRCAT   = "Migration Status (Baseline)",
  FATHSTAT  = "Father Status (Baseline)",
  MOTHSTAT  = "Mother Status (Baseline)",
  ORPHSTAT  = "Orphanhood Status (Baseline)",
  CLINDATA  = "Has Clinic Data",
  VISIT     = "Visit Name",
  STUDY     = "Study Name",
  SCHOOL    = "Currently in School",
  EMPLOY    = "Current Employment",
  GOVTGRNT  = "Receives Government Grant",
  EVRSEXCAT = "Ever Had Sex",
  HIVSTRESC = "HIV Test Result",
  VIOLENCE  = "Ever Experienced Violence",
  FOODSEC   = "Food Insecurity",
  EVRPREGCAT= "Ever Been Pregnant",
  SEXBHV    = "Sexual Behavior Category",
  DRNKALC   = "Ever Drank Alcohol",
  PHQ9      = "PHQ-9 Total Score",
  PHQ9FL    = "PHQ-9 ≥10",
  SISCORE   = "Suicidal Ideation Score",
  SIFL      = "Suicidal Ideation",
  SSQ14     = "SSQ-14 Score",
  SSQ14FL   = "SSQ-14 ≥9",
  SOCSUPP   = "Social Support",
  SISRC     = "SI Score Source",
  CDMLESSFL = "Condomless Sex",
  HSV2STRESC= "HSV-2 Test Result",
  CHLSTRESC = "Chlamydia Result",
  GONSTRESC = "Gonorrhea Result",
  TRISTRESC = "Trichomonas Result"
)

# ---- 3) Apply the labels -----------------------------------------------------
dt_multistudies <- DATA01 |>
  set_variable_labels(.labels = labels_for_dt,, .strict = FALSE) |> 
  relocate(USUBJID, HHID) |> 
  arrange(USUBJID, HHID,VISITDT)
```



```{r}
save(dt_childhood_exposure,file=here("../../data_management/data/co-luminate/adam/dt_childhood_exposure.RData"))
save(dt_multistudies,file=here("../../data_management/data/co-luminate/adam/dt_multistudies.RData"))
```

## Study Data or Material
```{r}
dt_childhood_exposure |> 
  func_dictionary() |> 
  tbl_listing()
```

```{r}
dt_multistudies |> 
  func_dictionary() |> 
  tbl_listing()
```
